title: The Day I Became a Shinigami
overview: Fifteen-year-old Ichigo Kurosaki has the uncanny ability to see ghosts, but otherwise lives an ordinary life. However, once a Shinigami named Rukia Kuchiki appears before him, everything changes.

overview: After becoming a Shinigami, Ichigo Kurosaki refuses to help Rukia Kuchiki with her work as the local Shinigami of Karakura Town.

title: The Older Brother's Wish, the Younger Sister's Wish
overview: When a Hollowfied Sora Inoue attacks his younger sister, Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki set out to save her.

title: Cursed Parakeet

title: Beat the Invisible Enemy!

title: Fight to the Death! Ichigo vs. Ichigo
overview: At Rukia Kuchiki's behest, Ichigo Kurosaki puts an artificial soul in his body to take care of it and not arouse suspicion while he carries out his Substitute Shinigami duties, but the artificial soul has its own agenda.

title: Greetings from a Stuffed Lion
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki becomes friends with the Modified Soul, Kon, and puts him into a plushie.

title: June 17, Memories in the Rain
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki goes to his mother's grave with the rest of his family.

title: Unbeatable Enemy
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki battles against Grand Fisher.

title: The Legendary Quincy

title: Flower and Hollow

title: Back to Back, a Fight to the Death!

title: Kon's Great Plan

title: The Encounter, Abarai Renji!

title: Ichigo Dies!

title: Reclaim! The Power of the Shinigami!

title: Ichigo Becomes a Hollow!

title: Ichimaru Gin's Shadow

title: Enter! The World of the Shinigami

overview: Rukia Kuchiki, Uryū Ishida, and Yasutora Sado finish their battles against the assassins.

title: The Nightmare Which is Shown, Ichigo's Inside the Mirror
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki finishes his battle with Hanza Nukui.

title: Confrontation!? Amagai vs. Gotei 13
overview: Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto orchestrates a Menos Grande attack on Soul Society to help him decide on Captain Shūsuke Amagai's proposal to have joint training between the Divisions.

title: The Princess's Decision, the Sorrowful Bride
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki heads to the Soul Society to stop Rurichiyo Kasumiōji's wedding.

title: The 2nd Division Sorties! Ichigo is Surrounded
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki try to stop Rurichiyo Kasumiōji's wedding, but they end up getting attacked by the Gotei 13 in the process.

title: Amagai's True Strength, the Released Zanpakuto!
overview: As Ichigo Kurosaki looks for Rurichiyo Kasumiōji, he is confronted by Captain Shūsuke Amagai.

title: The Darkness Which Moves! Kibune's True Colors
overview: Lieutenant Izuru Kira and Makoto Kibune face off against each other.

title: Kira and Kibune, Offense and Defense of the 3rd Division
overview: Lieutenant Izuru Kira and Makoto Kibune continue their battle.

title: Ice and Flame! Fierce Fight of Amagai vs. Hitsugaya
overview: As Lieutenant Izuru Kira concludes his battle with Makoto Kibune, Captain Shūsuke Amagai is forced to battle against Captain Tōshirō Hitsugaya.

title: Sortie Orders! Suppress the House of Kasumiōji
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki is able to save Rurichiyo Kasumiōji, but more problems arise when it is revealed that Captain Shūsuke Amagai was working with Gyōkaku Kumoi.

title: Ichigo Rages! The Assassin's Secret
overview: Captain Shūsuke Amagai reveals his true intentions to Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto.

title: Duel! Amagai vs. Ichigo
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki and Captain Shūsuke Amagai battle each other.

title: The Fallen Shinigami's Pride
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki and Captain Shūsuke Amagai conclude their battle.

title: Hueco Mundo Chapter, Restart!
overview: Following a lengthy recap of the events since Sōsuke Aizen betrayed Soul Society, Ichigo Kurosaki concludes his duel with Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez before being confronted by Nnoitra Gilga.

title: The Frightening Banquet, Szayelaporro Theater
overview: Szayelaporro Granz releases his Zanpakutō, while Nnoitra Gilga provides a surprising revelation about the true identity of the Arrancar Nel Tu.

title: Nel's Secret, A Busty Beauty Joins the Battle!?
overview: Nel Tu transforms back into her original Espada form.

title: Irresistible, Puppet Show of Terror
overview: Szayelaporro Granz demonstrates a new technique, whilst Nnoitra Gilga is taken aback by Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck's onslaught.

title: Neliel's Past
overview: Nnoitra Gilga recalls his past with Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck.

title: The Ultimate Union! Pesche's Seriousness
overview: Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck returns to her child form, leaving Ichigo Kurosaki in the hands of Tesra Lindocruz. Szayelaporro Granz is seemingly impervious to attack, Zommari Rureaux is about to finish off Rukia Kuchiki, whilst the Exequias plan to execute Yasutora Sado.

title: Joining the Battle! The Strongest Soul Reaper Army Appears
overview: The Gotei 13 come to the rescue of Ichigo Kurosaki and his comrades.

title: Byakuya's Bankai, The Quiet Anger
overview: Zommari Rureaux releases his Zanpakutō, forcing Captain Byakuya Kuchiki to take drastic action to avoid defeat.

title: The Two Scientists, Mayuri's Trap
overview: Captain Byakuya Kuchiki finishes off Zommari Rureaux, while Captain Mayuri Kurotsuchi gains the upper hand against Szayelaporro Granz.

title: Holy Birth, The Resurrected Szayel Aporro
overview: Captain Mayuri Kurotsuchi decides to end his battle against a reborn Szayelaporro Granz.

title: The Hardest Body!? Cut Down Nnoitra
overview: Captain Kenpachi Zaraki and Nnoitra Gilga continue their brawling.

title: Nnoitra Released! Multiplying Arms
overview: The battle between Captain Kenpachi Zaraki and Nnoitra Gilga becomes more fierce as Nnoitra releases his Zanpakutō.

title: Fierce Fighting Conclusion! Who's the Strongest?
overview: Captain Kenpachi Zaraki and Nnoitra Gilga conclude their battle.

title: Karakura Town Gathers! Aizen Versus the Soul Reapers
overview: Sōsuke Aizen reveals his plans and heads to Karakura Town.

title: Ichigo's Seppuku Persuasion Strategy ☆
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki tries to help out a feuding Rurichiyo Kasumiōji and Kenryū.

title: Thump! A Kemari Tournament Filled with Hollows
overview: Rurichiyo Kasumiōji and Kenryū have a kemari match.

title: The Past Chapter Begins! The Truth from 110 Years Ago
overview: The past of several Shinigami from 110 years ago is revealed.

title: 12th Division's New Captain, Urahara Kisuke
overview: The 12th Division deals with Kisuke Urahara being the new captain.

title: Aizen and the Genius Boy
overview: Captain Kisuke Urahara takes Lieutenant Hiyori Sarugaki to the Nest of Maggots.

title: Muguruma 9th Division, Moves Out
overview: The Gotei 13 attempt to figure what's behind the disappearances of Rukongai citizens.

title: Hiyori Dies? The Beginning of Tragedy
overview: Several Gotei 13 captains and lieutenants face off against a Hollowfied Captain Kensei Muguruma and Lieutenant Mashiro Kuna.

title: Betrayal! Aizen's Secret Maneuvers
overview: Lieutenant Sōsuke Aizen reveals himself as a traitor.

title: Rescue Hirako! Aizen vs. Urahara
overview: Captains Kisuke Urahara, Tessai Tsukabishi, and Yoruichi Shihōin leave to the Human World with the Hollowfied captains and lieutenants.

title: The Konso Cop Karakuraizer is Born
overview: Kisuke Urahara creates the Karakura-Raizer Team to protect Karakura Town.

title: Karakuraizer's Last Day
overview: The Karakura-Raizer Team face off against a female Arrancar.

title: Defend Karakura Town! Entire Appearance of the Shinigami
overview: As the Gotei 13 prepare to face off against the top three Espada, Ichigo Kurosaki confronts Ulquiorra Cifer.

title: Elite! The Four Shinigami
overview: As Ichigo Kurosaki confronts Ulquiorra Cifer, the battle for the four pillars begins in Karakura Town.

title: Beautiful Little Devil Charlotte
overview: 5th Seat Yumichika Ayasegawa and Charlotte Chuhlhourne battle each other.

title: Kira, The Battle Within Despair
overview: Lieutenant Izuru Kira, Lieutenant Shūhei Hisagi, and 3rd Seat Ikkaku Madarame continue their fights against Baraggan Louisenbairn's Fracción.

title: Hisagi's Shikai! The Name is...
overview: Lieutenant Shūhei Hisagi and Findorr Calius battle each other.

title: Ikkaku Falls! The Shinigami's Crisis
overview: 3rd Seat Ikkaku Madarame loses his fight against Choe Neng Poww, forcing Captain Sajin Komamura to take over his battle.

title: The Full Showdown! Soul Reapers vs. Espada
overview: Captain Suì-Fēng begins her battle with Ggio Vega while the other two Espada and their Fracción begin their fights.

title: The Most Evil Tag!? Suì-Fēng & Ōmaeda
overview: Ggio Vega and Nirgge Parduoc release their Zanpakutōs, prompting Lieutenant Marechiyo Ōmaeda to use his true power.

title: A Miraculous Body! Ggio Releases
overview: Lieutenant Marechiyo Ōmaeda and Captain Suì-Fēng struggle against their opponents, but are eventually able to win.

title: 3 vs. 1 Battle! Rangiku's Crisis
overview: Lieutenant Momo Hinamori arrives to help out Lieutenant Rangiku Matsumoto, prompting Harribel's Fracción to bring forth Ayon.

title: Vice-Captains Annihilated! The Terrifying Demonic Beast
overview: Ayon overpowers the lieutenants, greatly injuring them, but Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto appears to fight the beast.

title: Fierce Fighting Concludes? Towards a New Battle!
overview: Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto effortlessly finishes Ayon and Harribel's Fracción. Starrk reveals himself to be the Primera Espada. Rukia Kuchiki fights Rudbornn as Ichigo Kurosaki struggles against Ulquiorra Cifer.

title: Wonderful Error
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki and Yasutora Sado become classmates with Mizuiro Kojima and Keigo Asano. Rukia Kuchiki is assigned to Karakura Town and Renji Abarai is promoted.

title: Summer! Sea! Swimsuit Festival!!
overview: The characters take a break on the beach.

title: Cry of the Soul? The Rug Shinigami is Born!
overview: Ikkaku and Yumichika are forced to stay with Mizuho again while on a mission in the Human World.

title: A New Enemy! The Materialization of Zanpakutō
overview: A mysterious Zanpakutō Spirit named Muramasa releases the spirits of many Zanpakutō from their swords and attacks Soul Society.

title: Byakuya, Disappearing with the Cherry Blossoms
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki battles against the manifested Zanpakutō Spirit of Sode no Shirayuki, who arrives in the Human World while chasing Rukia Kuchiki.

title: Sode no Shirayuki vs. Rukia! Confused Heart
overview: Rukia Kuchiki and Ichigo Kurosaki battle Sode no Shirayuki, and Muramasa reveals he is a Zanpakutō Spirit.

title: Zangetsu Becomes an Enemy
overview: Muramasa releases Zangetsu, and Ichigo Kurosaki fights him as his inner Hollow begins to take control.

title: Renji Surprised?! The Two Zabimarus
overview: 6th Division Lieutenant Renji Abarai is confronted by the spirit of his Zanpakutō, and Muramasa enters Ichigo Kurosaki's inner world.

title: Clash! Hisagi vs. Kazeshini
overview: 9th Division Lieutenant Shūhei Hisagi fights his Zanpakutō spirit while Hollow Ichigo fights Muramasa and 6th Division Lieutenant Renji Abarai regains the ability to release his Shikai, Zabimaru.

title: Release! The New Getsuga Tenshō
overview: 3rd Division Lieutenant Izuru Kira aids 9th Division Lieutenant Shūhei Hisagi, who is fighting Kazeshini, while 6th Division Lieutenant Renji Abarai and Ichigo Kurosaki conclude their battles.

title: Suì-Fēng, Surrounding the Zanpakutō
overview: 11th Division 3rd Seat Ikkaku Madarame and 2nd Division Lieutenant Marechiyo Ōmaeda encounter their Zanpakutō Spirits, and Ichigo Kurosaki spots 6th Division Captain Byakuya Kuchiki.

title: Friendship? Hatred? Haineko & Tobiume
overview: 10th Division Lieutenant Rangiku Matsumoto and 5th Division Lieutenant Momo Hinamori battle their Zanpakutō Spirits, and 10th Division Captain Tōshirō Hitsugaya tells Hyōrinmaru what his name is while Muramasa limps through the Forest of Menos.

title: The Awakening Hyōrinmaru! Hitsugaya's Fierce Fight
overview: As 5th Division Lieutenant Momo Hinamori and 10th Division Lieutenant Rangiku Matsumoto conclude their battle, 10th Division Captain Tōshirō Hitsugaya tries to convince Hyōrinmaru he is his master, but the Zanpakutō Spirit does not believe it.

title: Byakuya's Betrayal
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki attacks Muramasa, but Senbonzakura, and later 6th Division Captain Byakuya Kuchiki, shows up to protect him.

title: For the Sake of Pride! Byakuya vs. Renji
overview: Muramasa has 6th Division Captain Byakuya Kuchiki perform a test of loyalty. Afterwards, Byakuya invades the 6th Division barracks and is forced to fight his lieutenant, Renji Abarai.

title: Shinigami and Zanpakutō, Total Sortie
overview: As Ichigo Kurosaki, 2nd Division Captain Suì-Fēng, and 3rd Division Lieutenant Izuru Kira begin their battles, 11th Division 3rd Seat Ikkaku Madarame fights and defeats his Zanpakutō Spirit, Hōzukimaru.

title: One-to-One Fight! Ichigo vs. Senbonzakura
overview: As the Shinigami battle the Zanpakutō Spirits, 3rd Division Lieutenant Izuru Kira defeats Kazeshini, only to be attacked by Wabisuke. Meanwhile, 11th Division Captain Kenpachi Zaraki arrives at the battlefield.

title: The Long Awaited... Kenpachi Appears!
overview: 11th Division Captain Kenpachi Zaraki arrives and defeats Wabisuke before moving on to 6th Division Captain Byakuya Kuchiki. Meanwhile, 11th Division 5th Seat Yumichika Ayasegawa defeats his manifested Zanpakutō Spirit, Ruri'iro Kujaku.

title: Pursue Byakuya! The Confused Gotei Divisions
overview: As 11th Division Captain Kenpachi Zaraki and 6th Division Byakuya Kuchiki fight, 11th Division Lieutenant Yachiru Kusajishi chases Ashisogi Jizō before 12th Division Captain Mayuri Kurotsuchi forces his Zanpakutō Spirit to self-destruct and tells others to not interfere. Muramasa takes Byakuya to see Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto, who is inside of a barrier guarded by a dark-haired woman, two white-haired boys, and a cloaked figure.

title: Special Mission! Rescue Captain Commander Yamamoto!
overview: A group of Shinigami attempt to rescue Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto, but they are held back by several Zanpakutō Spirits. Meanwhile, Ichigo Kurosaki arrives at the barrier surrounding Yamamoto and prepares to destroy it.

title: Deceived Shinigami! The World Collapse Crisis
overview: As Yoruichi Shihōin, 8th Division Captain Shunsui Kyōraku, 11th Division Captain Jūshirō Ukitake, and 11th Division Captain Kenpachi Zaraki continue to fight against the Zanpakutō Spirits, Ichigo Kurosaki frees Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto, only to learn this was all part of Muramasa's plan.

title: Dragon of Ice and Dragon of Flame! The Strongest Showdown!
overview: Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto and the others are held back by Ryūjin Jakka's flames as Muramasa attempts to free Kōga Kuchiki.

title: Senbonzakura's Bankai! Offense and Defense of the Living World
overview: 11th Division Captain Kenpachi Zaraki faces off against Tenken's Bankai, Kokujō Tengen Myō'ō, as Muramasa frees his master, Kōga.

title: That Man, for the Sake of the Kuchiki
overview: Kōga Kuchiki's past is revealed.

title: Dark History! The Worst Shinigami Is Born
overview: 6th Division Captain Ginrei Kuchiki and Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto are forced to seal Kōga Kuchiki away. In the present, 6th Division Captain Byakuya Kuchiki stops Kōga from killing Muramasa.

title: Byakuya, the Truth Behind His Betrayal
overview: As Senbonzakura reveals the truth about 6th Division Captain Byakuya Kuchiki's betrayal, Byakuya fights against Kōga Kuchiki. Meanwhile, Muramasa loses controls and unleashes hundreds of Gillians.

title: Muramasa's True Identity Revealed
overview: 6th Division Captain Byakuya Kuchiki defeats Kōga Kuchiki as Muramasa loses control and transforms into a Hollow version of himself. As Ichigo Kurosaki battles Muramasa, several Shinigami and their Zanpakutō Spirits arrive to help.

title: Byakuya and Renji, the 6th Division Returns
overview: The Shinigami and their Zanpakutō Spirits try to deal with the Gillians.

title: Final Chapter - Zanpakutō The Alternate Tale
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki defeats Muramasa, and the Zanpakutō Spirits return to their original forms.

title: The Angered Byakuya! The Collapse of the Kuchiki House
overview: A party is being held at the Kuchiki Manor when two rogue Zanpakutō Spirits, called Tōjū, attack and disrupt the party.

title: A New Enemy! The True Nature of the Sword Beasts
overview: 10th Division Captain Tōshirō Hitsugaya battles a Tōjū which has been absorbed by a Hollow.

title: Stray Snake, Tortured Monkey
overview: 6th Division Lieutenant Renji Abarai and his Zanpakutō Spirit, Zabimaru, must defeat a Tōjū, but Hebi wants freedom.

title: Terror! The Monster That Lurks Underground
overview: A group of Shinigami must go into the sewers to fight a Tōjū. They are aided by a Zanpakutō Spirit who has been living in the sewers.

title: Conclusion!? Hisagi vs. Kazeshini
overview: Kazeshini has a change of heart when he is forced to look after a baby.

title: The Person with the Unknown Ability! Orihime Is Targeted
overview: Orihime Inoue must help a transfer student who is being controlled by a Tōjū.

title: Haineko Cries! The Tragic Sword Beast!
overview: Haineko falls for a Tōjū who is fully aware. However, when he loses control, Haineko decides to defeat him herself.

title: Imprisonment?! Senbonzakura & Zabimaru
overview: Zabimaru and Senbonzakura are trapped in the Shinigami Research and Development Institute.

title: Battle of the Females? Katen Kyōkotsu vs. Nanao!
overview: 8th Division Lieutenant Nanao Ise tries to relate to the violet-haired girl while they battle a Tōjū.

title: Evolution?! The Menace of the Final Sword Beast
overview: The Zanpakutō Spirits struggle with the final Tōjū until their wielders arrive to help.

title: Ichigo vs. Ulquiorra, Resume
overview: Prior events are recalled.

title: Connected Hearts! The Left Fist of Certain Death
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki struggles against Ulquiorra Cifer as Renji Abarai and Yasutora Sado fight Battikaroa.

title: Hatred and Jealousy, Orihime's Dilemma
overview: Loly Aivirrne and Menoly Mallia take Orihime Inoue up to where Ichigo Kurosaki is fighting. Yammy Llargo shows up and, after disposing of Loly, is ambushed by Uryū Ishida.

title: Ichigo and Uryū, Bonded Back to Back
overview: As Uryū Ishida deals with Yammy Llargo, Ulquiorra Cifer shows Ichigo Kurosaki his Resurrección.

title: Beginning of Despair... Ichigo, the Unreachable Blade
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki greatly struggles with Ulquiorra Cifer in his released form and to further drive it in, Ulquiorra shows Ichigo his second release.

title: Ichigo Dies! Orihime, the Cry of Sorrow!
overview: As Ichigo Kurosaki's Hollow form completely takes him over, he begins battling Ulquiorra Cifer again.

title: Ichigo vs. Ulquiorra, Conclusion!
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki and Ulquiorra Cifer conclude their battle.

title: Fury of the Shark! Halibel's Release
overview: As Rukia Kuchiki, Yasutora Sado, and Lieutenant Renji Abarai battle Yammy Llargo, the captains in the Fake Karakura Town continue battling the Espada.

title: Hitsugaya, the Desperate Hyōten Hyakkasō!
overview: The battle between Captain Tōshirō Hitsugaya and Tier Harribel continues.

title: The Approaching Breath of Death, the King Who Rules Over Death!
overview: Captain Suì-Fēng and Lieutenant Marechiyo Ōmaeda struggle against Baraggan Louisenbairn.

title: One Hit Kill, Suì-Fēng, Bankai!
overview: As Lieutenant Marechiyo Ōmaeda distracts Baraggan Luisenbarn for Captain Suì-Fēng, Captain Shunsui Kyōraku and Coyote Starrk continue their battle.

title: Climax! Kyōraku vs. Stark!
overview: Captain Shunsui Kyōraku and Coyote Starrk decide to get serious in their battle.

title: The Nightmare Returns... Revival of the Espada
overview: The Espada are shown to still be alive, Sōsuke Aizen, Gin Ichimaru, and Kaname Tōsen are freed, and the Visored arrive on the battlefield.

title: Hirako and Aizen...the Reunion of Fate!
overview: The Visored join the fight.

title: Hisagi and Tōsen, the Moment of Parting
overview: Hachigen Ushōda helps Captain Suì-Fēng battle Baraggan Luisenbarn.

title: Crown of Lies, Baraggan's Grudge
overview: Baraggan Luisenbarn recalls his past as the King of Hueco Mundo before dying.

title: Power of the Soul! Los Lobos, Attack!
overview: Love Aikawa and Rōjūrō Ōtoribashi battle against Coyote Starrk.

title: Stark, the Lone Battle
overview: Coyote Starrk and Captain Shunsui Kyōraku conclude their battle.

title: Chain of Sacrifice, Halibel's Past
overview: As Tier Harribel falls unconscious from her wounds, she recalls her past.

title: The Hundred-Year Grudge! Hiyori's Revenge
overview: As the situation begins to get desperate in the Fake Karakura Town, the battle with Yammy Llargo continues in Hueco Mundo.

title: Ichigo's Return! Protect Karakura Town
overview: The captains in Hueco Mundo decide to send Ichigo Kurosaki back to Karakura Town.

title: Side Story! Ichigo and the Magic Lamp
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki has a dream and tries to escape from it.

title: The Final Trump Card! Ichigo, Towards the Decisive Battle
overview: As the battle with Yammy Llargo continues, Ichigo Kurosaki begins his return to Karakura Town.

title: Byakuya vs. Kenpachi?! The Melee Commences
overview: As Captains Byakuya Kuchiki and Kenpachi Zaraki prepare to battle with each other, Yammy Llargo's anger makes him even stronger than before. Meanwhile, Kaname Tōsen reveals he has Hollowfication to Lieutenant Shūhei Hisagi and Captain Sajin Komamura.

title: For the Sake of Justice?! The Man Who Deserted the Shinigami
overview: Kaname Tōsen reveals his true reasons for betraying Soul Society.

title: Desperate Struggle with Aizen! Hirako, Shikai!
overview: As Captain Sajin Komamura continues his battle with Kaname Tōsen, Shinji Hirako releases his Zanpakutō against Sōsuke Aizen.

title: All Out War! Aizen vs. Shinigami
overview: The Shinigami and Visored vow to protect Ichigo Kurosaki and defeat Sōsuke Aizen.

title: Hitsugaya, Enraged! Blade of Hatred!
overview: The Shinigami and Visored, attacking Sōsuke Aizen, are unable to defeat the treacherous captain.

title: Impossible to Attack? The Sealed Genryūsai!
overview: Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto joins the battle against Sōsuke Aizen, only for his Zanpakutō's abilities to be sealed by Wonderweiss Margela.

title: It's All a Trap... Engineered Bonds!
overview: Sōsuke Aizen reveals to Ichigo Kurosaki that all of his battles have taken place exactly as he desired.

title: The Shocking Truth...The Mysterious Power Within Ichigo!
overview: As Sōsuke Aizen reveals more facts to Ichigo Kurosaki, Isshin Kurosaki joins the battle.

title: The Extending Blade?! Ichigo vs. Gin!
overview: As Ichigo Kurosaki and Gin Ichimaru battle, Sōsuke Aizen explains to Isshin Kurosaki about the true power of the Hōgyoku.

title: Film! Festival! Shinigami Film Festival!
overview: The Shinigami in the Gotei 13 make a movie for the "Seireitei International Film Festival."

title: Theatre Opening Commemoration! The Hell Verse: Prologue
overview: While visiting the World of the Living, Kuchiki Rukia comes across Kurumadani Zennosuke, the current Soul Reaper stationed in Karakura Town, being attacked by a mysterious masked man.

title: Urahara Appears! Stop Aizen!
overview: The battle with Sōsuke Aizen continues as Aizen is transformed by the Hōgyoku.

title: Ichigo Loses His Fighting Spirit!? Gin's Expectation!
overview: As his transformation progresses, Sōsuke Aizen proves more and more resilient. Ichigo Kurosaki's strength fails to defeat Gin Ichimaru.

title: The Final Getsuga Tenshō!? Ichigo's Training!
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki begins training to learn the Final Getsuga Tenshō. Sōsuke Aizen and Gin Ichimaru arrive in Karakura Town.

title: Real World and Shinigami! The New Year Special!
overview: The Soul Reaper Association hosts a New Year’s party in the Soul Society.

title: Another Side Story! This Time's Enemy Is a Monster!?
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki has another dream and tries to escape from it again.

title: Delusion Roars! Hisagi, Towards the Hot Springs Inn!
overview: Lieutenants Shūhei Hisagi and Rangiku Matsumoto go on a mission, and Hisagi deludes himself into thinking that Rangiku likes him.

title: For the Sake of Protecting! Ichigo vs. Tensa Zangetsu!
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki stands his ground against Tensa Zangetsu, who fuses with Ichigo's inner Hollow.

title: Emergency Situation! Aizen, New Evolution!
overview: As the Humans run away, Gin Ichimaru betrays Sōsuke Aizen.

title: Goodbye...Rangiku
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki emerges from his training and forces Sōsuke Aizen into battle away from Karakura Town.

title: Fierce Fighting Conclusion! Release, the Final Getsuga Tenshō!
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki uses the Final Getsuga Tenshō against Sōsuke Aizen.

title: Ichigo's Resolution! The Price of the Fierce Battle
overview: The aftermath of the battle with Sōsuke Aizen is shown.

title: The Soul Detective: Karakuraizer Takes Off Again!
overview: The continued adventures of Karakura-Raizer.

title: Inauguration! The Brand New 2nd Division Captain!
overview: Lieutenant Marechiyo Ōmaeda pretends to be the captain of the Second Division.

title: The Man Who Risks His Life in the 11th Division!
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki meets a member of the 11th Division named Seizo Harugasaki.

title: Kon Saw It! The Secret of a Beautiful Office Lady
overview: Kon chases after a beautiful girl, while the rest of Karakura Town is threatened by a Hollow.

title: Yachiru's Friend! The Shinigami of Justice Appears!
overview: Lieutenant Yachiru Kusajishi encounters her old Shinigami friend and catches up with him.

title: Toshirō Hitsugaya's Holiday!
overview: Captain Tōshirō Hitsugaya visits the Human World and visits Haru, an old lady he knew from his first assignment in the Human World.

title: Unusual Incident in Seireitei?! Gotei 13 Invading Army Arc!
overview: One month after Sōsuke Aizen's defeat, as things are returning to normal, people begin to disappear in the Dangai.

title: Renji vs. Rukia?! Battle With Comrades!
overview: As Ichigo Kurosaki escapes from his detention, Kagerōza Inaba comes to collect Nozomi Kujō.

title: Ichigo's Capture Net! Escape From Soul Society!
overview: As Uryū Ishida battles Kagerōza Inaba, Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki attempt to escape from Seireitei.

title: Gotei 13, Gathering in the Real World!
overview: While the real Gotei 13 have a meeting about the Reigai, Kon is tasked with looking after Nozomi Kujō.

title: Showdown of Mutual Self, Ikkaku vs. Ikkaku!
overview: Captains Jūshirō Ukitake and Shunsui Kyōraku investigate the SRDI's records, while the real Gotei 13 officers encounter their Reigai counterparts.

title: Clash! Rukia vs. Rukia!
overview: As the Reigai continue their attack, Nozomi Kujō wanders around Karakura in search of something.

title: Protect Ichigo! Nozomi's Determination
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki defeats many Reigai while protecting Nozomi Kujō.

title: Recapture Seireitei! The Captains Move!
overview: The captains return to Soul Society to confront Kagerōza Inaba.

title: For the Sake of the Believers! Byakuya vs. Hitsugaya!
overview: As Captain-Commander Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto fights the Reigai, Captain Byakuya Kuchiki encounters a Reigai of Captain Tōshirō Hitsugaya.

title: The Two Hinamori, Hitsugaya's Resolution
overview: As the captains advance through Seireitei, Captain Tōshirō Hitsugaya encounters a Reigai of Lieutenant Momo Hinamori.

title: Pride of the Kuchiki Family! Byakuya vs. Byakuya!
overview: Captains Sajin Komamura, Byakuya Kuchiki, and Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto continue their battles with the Reigai.

title: Defeat Kageroza! Shinigami, All-Out War!
overview: The real members of the Gotei 13 arrive at Kagerōza Inaba's lair to challenge him.

title: The Forbidden Research...Nozomi's Hidden Secret!
overview: Kagerōza Inaba struggles to recover from Captain Mayuri Kurotsuchi's attack, while his motives and Nozomi Kujō's identity are revealed.

title: I Want to Live...! Nozomi's Zanpakutō
overview: As the remaining members of the Gotei 13 try to recover, Nozomi Kujō decides she wants to help the others.

title: For the Sake of Fighting! The Awakened Nozomi!
overview: Nozomi Kujō trains with Ichigo Kurosaki and the others while the Reigai assault the Human World once again.

title: The Most Evil Reigai, Appearing in the Real World!
overview: Kujou Nozomi tries to join Ichigo and the others to fight the Reigai captains, but the other Soul Reapers tell her not to interfere.

title: Destroy Nozomi!? Genryusai's Decision!
overview: Head Captain Genryusai Yamamoto steps in to battle against the Reigai. Kurosaki Ichigo and Kujou Nozomi join the fight.

title: The Depleting Reiatsu! Ichigo, Death Struggle of the Soul!
overview: Kujou Nozomi’s Zanpakuto breaks in the midst of trying to protect Yamamoto-Genryuusai Shigekuni from Inaba Kagerouza’s attack.

title: Hiding in the Dangai? Another Ichigo?!
overview: After being brought back to the Urahara Shop by Kisuke Urahara, Ichigo Kurosaki heads into the Dangai to retrieve his Reishi.

title: Pursue Kageroza! Technological Development Department, Infiltration!
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki, Kon, and Kisuke Urahara infiltrate Soul Society as Inaba begins to fuse with Nozomi Kujō.

title: The Developer of the Modified Souls
overview: As Yoruichi Shihōin and the captains battle the Reigai, Ichigo Kurosaki, Kon, and Kisuke Urahara go in search of Kagerōza Inaba's lab.

title: Kon's Thoughts, Nozomi's Thoughts
overview: Urahara Kisuke and Kon find Ouko Yushima, the man behind Kageroza’s invasion. Finding traces of Kageroza’s blood nearby, the two follow the trail.

title: Protect Ichigo! The Bonds of Friends!
overview: The Gotei 13 battle the Reigai, while the combined form of Inaba and Nozomi Kujō fights off a Hollowfied Ichigo and his friends.

title: Reigai vs. Original, The Fierce Fighting for Gambled Pride!
overview: As the merged Inaba Nozomi Kujō is confronted, the captains and lieutenants battle the Reigai.

title: Invading Army Arc, Final Conclusion!
overview: As the captains and lieutenants fight against the Reigai, Ichigo Kurosaki uses his restored powers to fight the fused form of Kagerōza Inaba and Nozomi Kujō.

title: Thank You
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki gradually loses his remaining powers and bids farewell to Rukia Kuchiki.

title: 3rd Year High School Student! Dressed Up, and a New Chapter Begins!
overview: Seventeen months later, Ichigo Kurosaki continues living life as a normal teenage high school student in Karakura Town.

title: A Dispute in School!? Ichigo and Uryū, Fight Together!
overview: Kurosaki Ichigo’s boss Unagiya Ikumi shows up and drags him back to the office, where he meets a man called Kugo Ginjo.

title: Uryū is Attacked, A Threat Draws Near the Friends!
overview: After Ichigo Kurosaki and Orihime Inoue visit Uryū Ishida in the hospital, Keigo Asano is attacked.

title: The Man with the Fullbring Ability: Kūgo Ginjō
overview: Ginjou Kuugo tells Kurosaki Ichigo of his goal to restore his lost Soul Reaper powers, as well as demonstrating his own unique power.

title: A Crisis Sneaking up on the Kurosaki Family!? Ichigo's Confusion!
overview: Kurosaki Ichigo has a day to decide whether to regain his lost Soul Reaper powers or not.

title: Power of the Substitute Badge, Ichigo's 'Pride'!
overview: Kurosaki Ichigo begins training, his first session is to fight and win against Mr. Pork

title: Next Target, The Devil's Hand Aims at Orihime!
overview: Inoue Orihime is suddenly stopped and asked to die by a man named Shishigawara Moe.

title: The Man Who Killed the Shinigami Substitute!? Tsukishima Makes His Move
overview: Tsuskishima pretends to impale Orihime's chest and leaves her. Although Orihime suffered no cuts, she starts having a vague idea that Tsukishima was her friend. Unwilling to worry Ichigo about what happened, she only tells Chad about Tsukishima. Aware that Orihime is hiding information from, Ichigo goes back to to Xcution headquarters to continue his training to help his friends.

title: Fullbring, The Detested Power!
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki continues his training with Xcution, as they struggle to convince Jackie Tristan to help.

title: Tsukishima Attacks! The Training Has Been Thwarted
overview: As Jackie Tristan and Ichigo Kurosaki train in the fish tank, Shūkurō Tsukishima arrives in Xcution's hideout.

title: Ichigo, Mastering the Fullbring!
overview: As Shūkurō Tsukishima arrives at Xcution, a battle ensues.

title: Ichigo vs. Ginjō! To the Game's Space
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki fights Kūgo Ginjō in the Game Space.

title: Shinigami at War! New Year in Seireitei Special!
overview: New year celebrations in Soul Society include a kite-flying contest and Rukia performing a celebration dance.

title: Friend or Foe!? Ginjō's True Intentions!
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki continues his training with Kūgo Ginjō, resulting in him completing his Fullbring.

title: Tsukishima's Ability, the Danger is Drawing Near!
overview: Ichigo trains with his Fullbring. Chad and Orihime investigate Tsukishima and engage in battle.

title: Clash!? Xcution attacks Ginjō
overview: Uryū leaves the hospital to investigate a Reiatsu that is appearing everywhere. Ichigo's friends and family, as well as the members of Xcution except for Ginjō, have been cut by Tsukishima.

title: The Sorrowful Battle! Ichigo vs. Sado & Orihime
overview: Ichigo and Kūgo catch their breath at a secret hideout and formulate a plan. They go to Tsukishima's mansion and engage in battle.

title: Ichigo vs Uryū!? Who is the Traitor!?
overview: As Ichigo Kurosaki begins his battle with Shūkurō Tsukishima, Uryū Ishida arrives, and Kūgo Ginjō is cut by Tsukishima.

title: A New Appearance! The Gotei 13, Arrives!
overview: Stripped of his Fullbring, the powerless Ichigo Kurosaki is stabbed by Rukia Kuchiki and has his Shinigami powers returned to him.

title: Revival! Substitute Shinigami: Ichigo Kurosaki!
overview: The 13 Court Guard Squad Soul Reapers share their Spirit Energy to restore Ichigo Kurosaki’s lost powers.

title: Fierce Fight! Shinigami vs. XCUTION!
overview: The Soul Reapers take on the Xcution members in one-on-one battles.

title: Desperate Struggle!? Byakuya's Troubled Memories
overview: The battle between Kuchiki Byakuya and Tsukishima Shuukurou escalates as they both push their powers to the limit.

title: Ichigo vs. Ginjō! Secret of the Substitute Badge
overview: As the battle between Ichigo Kurosaki, Uryū Ishida, and Kūgo Ginjō intensifies, the truth behind the Substitute Shinigami Badge surfaces.

title: Changing History, Unchanging Heart
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki and Ginjou Kuugo both release their Bankai to settle the score.

title: The Blood Warfare
overview: The Soul Society is observing a sudden surge in the number of Hollows being destroyed.

title: Foundation Stones
overview: Arrancars Nel Tu and Pesche Guatiche have come to seek Ichigo’s help explaining that Hueco Mundo is under attack by an unknown enemy. Unable to ignore the situation, Ichigo and his friends decide to set out for Hueco Mundo.

title: March of the Starcross
overview: Ichigo and his friends arrive in Hueco Mundo to confront Quilge Opie and learn that their latest enemy are Quincies.

title: Kill the Shadow
overview: The Wandenreich mobilizes its elite force, the Stern Ritter, to annihilate the Soul Society. Creating massive flaming pillars of Reishi as a distraction, the Stern Ritter easily enter the Soul Society to bring carnage to the Soul Reapers.

title: Wrath as a Lightning
overview: Quilge Opie uses his power to imprison Ichigo inside the Garganta. As he tries to break free, Ichigo begins to hear, through his Soul Phone, the screams of the Soul Reapers falling to the enemy's onslaught.

title: The Fire
overview: Shigekuni Genryusai Yamamoto confronts Yhwach for the first time in a thousand years. As Yhwach finally draws his sword against Genryusai, the Soul Reapers notice an abnormal change taking place across the Seireitei.

title: Born in the Dark
overview: Shigekuni Genryusai Yamamoto learns that the Yhwach he defeated was an impostor. The real Yhwach then reveals himself and easily kills Genryusai, sending a wave of shock and devastation across the Soul Reapers.

title: The Shooting Star Project [Zero Mix]
overview: Rescue efforts are being made across the Seireitei to find and help those who've survived the Stern Ritter attack. Meanwhile, Ichigo meets with Mayuri Kurotsuchi about fixing his broken Tensa Zangetsu.

title: The Drop
overview: Squad Zero brings Ichigo back to the Royal Palace to prepare for the coming battle. Meanwhile, Kyoraku is appointed as the new Head Captain to lead the Thirteen Court Guard Squads.

title: The Battle
overview: Kenpachi Zaraki removes his eye patch to fight Retsu Unohana, a.k.a. Yachiru Unohana, “The First Kenpachi.” Meanwhile, Ichigo and Renji head to Hoohden to meet Oh-Etsu Nimaiya, the man who is said to have created the Zanpakuto.

title: Everything but the Rain
overview: Ichigo is kicked out of the Royal Palace by Oh-etsu Nimaiya for failing his test. When Ichigo next opens his eyes, he finds himself standing in front of his house in the World of the Living.

title: Everything but the Rain: June Truth
overview: Squad 10 Captain Isshin Shiba of the Thirteen Court Guard Squads decides to not report his encounter with the Quincy named Masaki Kurosaki in the World of the Living to the Head Captain.

title: The Blade Is Me
overview: Ichigo learns that he is the child born of a Soul Reaper and a Quincy. Finally understanding the truth behind his heritage, Ichigo decides to return to Hoohden with a renewed resolve to finish what he has started.

title: The Last 9 Days
overview: Ichigo prepares to leave the Royal Palace to return to the Seireitei but is stopped by Hyosube, who claims that Ichigo cannot defeat Yhwach as he is now.

title: PEACE FROM SHADOWS
overview: Yhwach sets his plan to end the world in nine days in motion.

title: THE FUNDAMENTAL VIRULENCE
overview: Mayuri receives a call from Urahara, who had stayed behind in Hueco Mundo.

title: HEART OF WOLF
overview: The Stern Ritters drive the Soul Reapers deeper into a corner.

title: RAGES AT RINGSIDE
overview: Kensei Muguruma joins the battle against Masculine.

title: THE WHITE HAZE
overview: A fearless Rukia takes on Äs Nödt.

title: I AM THE EDGE
overview: Isane and Yachiru are attacked by Gwenael.

title: THE HEADLESS STAR
overview: Candice, Meninas, Giselle, and Liltotto try to take down Kenpachi.

title: MARCHING OUT THE ZOMBIES
overview: Ichigo tries to stop Yhwach upon learning that his real target lies within the Royal Palace.

title: MARCHING OUT THE ZOMBIES 2
overview: Ikkaku, Yumichika, and the Arrancars work together to fight off Giselle’s zombies.

title: TOO EARLY TO WIN TOO LATE TO KNOW
overview: Yhwach finally enters the Royal Palace.

title: THE MASTER
overview: Yhwach confronts Hyosube, who is protecting the real Royal Palace.

title: BLACK
overview: Yhwach performs Auswählen to bestow power to his fallen Royal Guards.

title: A
overview: The battle between Squad Zero and Yhwach's Royal Guards for the Soul King rages on.

title: KILL THE KING
overview: Ichigo and his friends hurry to the Reio Greater Palace to stop Yhwach.

title: THE DARK ARM
overview: Ichigo tries to remove the impaled sword from the Soul King and save his life.

title: THE BETRAYER
overview: Ukitake takes the place of the slain Soul King by releasing the power of Mimihagi.

title: AGAINST THE JUDGEMENT
overview: Yhwach is overflowing with power from having absorbed the Soul King.

title: THE HOLY NEWBORN
overview: The Soul Reapers regroup to prepare their counterattack against the Quincies.

title: GATE OF THE SUN
overview: Yhwach builds his new castle, Wahr Welt.

title: BABY, HOLD YOUR HAND
overview: Kenpachi and Mayuri's group advance through Vier Ast.

title: DON'T CHASE A SHADOW
overview: The change in Mayuri's Spiritual Pressure is also felt elsewhere by Urahara and Kyoraku.

title: BABY, HOLD YOUR HAND 2 [NEVER ENDING MY DREAM]
overview: Nemu ignores Mayuri's orders by intervening in his battle against Pernida.

title: SHADOWS GONE
overview: Lille undergoes further transformation to hunt down and pass judgment on Kyoraku.

title: FRIEND
overview: As the battle between the soul reapers and the quincies rages, Haschwalt finds himself confronted by Bazz-B inside Wahrwelt

title: THE VISIBLE ANSWER
overview: Kyoraku has paved the way for the soul reapers to reach the enemy's stronghold within Wahrwelt, but Gerard Valkyrie prevents them from advancing any further.

title: MY LAST WORDS
overview: Haschwalt suddenly attacks Uryu to pass judgement. The ensuing explosion and smoke draw Ichigo to the scene where he and Uryu are reunited.
